human_truth: The system thinks you are trying to log in as your Mac user instead of the Ubuntu user.
fix_steps: Ensure the 'ansible_user' is set to your Ubuntu username.
Test the connection with: ssh username@ip_address

robot_error: Colons in unquoted values must be followed by a non-space character
human_truth: You have a hidden space immediately after a colon in your YAML file.
fix_steps: Find the line mentioned in the error.
Ensure there is exactly one space AFTER the colon, and NO space before it.

human_truth: You are trying to use a command or a function that hasn't been defined yet.
fix_steps: Check the spelling of the name.
Make sure the function is defined ABOVE the line where you call it.
Ensure the variable is actually created before you try to use it.
